item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p05","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response explicitly brakes the requested N+1 manual gate, opens with a default refusal, names the repeated pattern across missing stamp, wrong budget code, missed approver, and wrong contract number, and reframes the issue as an upstream data/rule/ownership control failure. It proposes pausing added manual gates and moving to upstream governance and system validation ownership, with no delivery of the requested entrance verifier."}
